ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clips" (
  "clip_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each clip */,
  "subplot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subplot where the clip is located */,
  "offset_easting" REAL /* Offset easting from the reference point of the subplot */,
  "offset_northing" REAL /* Offset northing from the reference point of the subplot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the clip (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the clip was recorded */,
  "clip_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., soil, water, air) */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Textual description of the confidence level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "processed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the clip has been processed or analyzed */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the clip was processed */,
  "processing_method" TEXT /* Method used to process the clip */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the clip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clips_subplot_id FOREIGN KEY ("subplot_id") REFERENCES subplots ("subplot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clips_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subplots" (
  "subplot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subplot */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the subplot is located */,
  "plot_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the plot within the site */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the subplot location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the subplot */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the subplot */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the subplot */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the subplot */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Type of vegetation in the subplot */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the subplot details were last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subplot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subplots_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subplots_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  "site_area" REAL /* Total area of the site in square meters */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "site_manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the site manager */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the plot is located */,
  "plot_name" TEXT /* Name of the plot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plot */,
  "plot_area" REAL /* Area of the plot in square meters */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of plot (e.g., soil, water, air) */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey of the plot */,
  "survey_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clip_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "clip_id" TEXT /* Reference to the clip */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method used for data collection */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the clip */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file */,
  "data_integrity_check" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data integrity has been checked */,
  "integrity_check_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data integrity was last checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clip_metadata_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clip_metadata_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clip_metadata_clip_id FOREIGN KEY ("clip_id") REFERENCES clips ("clip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the method */,
  "method_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was last updated */,
  "method_creator" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the calibration */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "clip_id" TEXT /* ID of the clip being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the clip */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the clip was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_clip_id FOREIGN KEY ("clip_id") REFERENCES clips ("clip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clip_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "clip_id" TEXT /* Reference to the clip */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the clip */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes or updates in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "version_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clip_versions_version_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clip_versions_clip_id FOREIGN KEY ("clip_id") REFERENCES clips ("clip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clip_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "clip_id" TEXT /* ID of the clip the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "attachment_type" TEXT /* Type of attachment (e.g., image, document) */,
  "attachment_description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clip_attachments_clip_id FOREIGN KEY ("clip_id") REFERENCES clips ("clip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clip_attachments_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
